name: Tzimmes and a Gahtzah Tzimmes
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the beef brisket in water to cover until nearly tender (about 1½ hours). The water will reduce to about half the original amount.
2. Peel and slice carrots into half-inch rounds.
3. Add the sliced carrots, salt, and brown sugar to the simmering meat.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the carrots are very tender (about 45 minutes).
5. In a small skillet, brown flour over medium heat, stirring constantly to avoid burning.
6. Remove the pan from the burner when the flour is light brown.
7. Add schmaltz and stir until smooth.
8. Gradually stir in carrot stock to form a smooth paste.
9. Carefully add this paste to the carrots, stirring gently.
10. Continue simmering until the stock has thickened (about 10–15 minutes).
